category_sources: Official homepage says fizmo runs interactive fiction/text adventures implemented for the Z-Machine.
source_facts.description identifies fizmo as a Z-Machine interpreter.
docs_sources: Official fizmo homepage is the main project documentation surface.
Official homepage links to the GitHub repository README.
repo_sources: GitHub repository identifies itself as chrender/fizmo and links back to fizmo.spellbreaker.org.
Official fizmo homepage has a github link to chrender/fizmo.
tags_sources: Official homepage says fizmo provides a plain C Z-Machine interpreter library with console, ncurses, and SDL2 frontends.
